productDisplayName: Force 10 Men Grey & White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. Product DetailsWhite and grey round toed shoe with perforations on the forefoot and midfoot regionHas central lace-ups, padded inner and tongue and plastic inlays at the midfoot regionHas an EVA midsole and a TPU outsoleDeep flex grooves at the outsole with a pivot point (for easy rotation of feet) at the big toe mound Material and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
